data.scene: User enters WiFi credentials in the frontend to configure a new IoT device.
data.purpose: Transmit WiFi network credentials to IoT devices via Bluetooth for network configuration.
data.source: User manually enters credentials in the Home Assistant frontend
data.recipient: Target IoT device (direct Bluetooth BLE transmission)
data.switchpath: Frontend Settings -> Devices & Services -> Add Device -> Improv

permissions.name: BLUETOOTH_CONNECT
permissions.purpose: Connect to IoT devices via BLE and transmit WiFi credentials
permissions.impact: If denied, Improv Bluetooth provisioning will be unavailable

permissions.name: BLUETOOTH_SCAN
permissions.scene: When scanning for nearby Improv devices on Android 12+
permissions.impact: If denied, nearby Improv devices cannot be discovered
